news.text: No specific forecasts available for April 4, 2026 high temperature in Denver; yesterday (April 3) recorded ~52-53°F per Polymarket consensus and NWS data at KDEN amid cold front and gusty winds[1][4].

ThorntonWeather.com forecasts highs in the mid-60s for Saturday (April 4, 2026), with sunny skies and breezy winds[4]. AccuWeather's April 2026 monthly forecast shows daily highs ranging 55-80°F, aver

Polymarket trader consensus for NYC high temp on April 4, 2026, at LaGuardia Airport shows 99.8-100% implied probability for 58°F or higher, with NWS guidance projecting mid-to-upper 60s°F under a per

Yesterday (April 3, 2026), Austin's high temperature reached 84°F per official KAUS report at 6:53 PM UTC, below the 92°F threshold[1]. Robinhood prediction market prices >83° at implied ~12%, >84° lo

Forecasts for April 4, 2026, in Miami show high temperatures of 77°F (EaseWeather[1]), 76°F (AccuWeather Miami Beach[6]), 84°F (AccuWeather North Miami Beach[8]), and 77°F (Weathershogun[4]). Historic
Actual high temperature in Denver on April 3, 2026, was 41°F at 8:53 AM UTC (14:53 local), with very cold conditions, dry air (dew point 7°F), 24% humidity, strong WNW winds at 25.3 mph gusting to 44

Actual high temperature in Chicago on April 3, 2026, was 54°F at 1:53 PM per WeatherSpark report from KMDW (Midway Airport), cooler than the 62-63°F range[5]. April normals show average high of 54°F[6

Prediction market data from Polymarket shows 64-65°F at 85% implied probability for NYC's April 3 high, with 66-67°F at 9%. Weather forecasts from multiple sources indicate highs between 57-72°F for A

Official observations from National Weather Service at Central Park and LaGuardia Airport (KLGA ASOS) recorded a high of 65°F on April 3, 2026, confirmed by METAR reports and preliminary hourly data[1
